_comment: Karma Wastes Crystal Formation (因果荒原结晶阵) — a formation of crystallized karmic debt in the Karma Wastes. Canon: karmic debt crystallizes physically in the wastes, forming dangerous crystal formations that emit corrupting influence. Cultivators who touch them without sufficient Dao comprehension are driven mad. These formations are both hazards and resources — shattered crystals yield karmic essence. Biome: karma_wastes. Stand-in: village meeting point.
